# Vault Lint Report — 2026-04-21

**Generated by:** `/vault-lint` (manual)
**Vault scope:** 324 markdown files (excl. CC Chat History), 6 `_learnings.md` files, 51 session archives in last 14 days
**Runtime cost:** ~$0.20

## Summary

The biggest issue this cycle is staleness: no `_learnings.md` file has been updated since 2026-04-06, leaving 51 sessions (Apr 8–21) unprocessed — including the April 14 customer interview and April 16 user journey sync, both high-value. MEMORY.md also has two significant stale entries: it doesn't acknowledge PRD V1.4 (last updated April 16) and carries pre-audit board counts. Structural checks found 4 real broken wikilinks and 1 oversized `_learnings.md`.

| Check | Count | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Broken wikilinks (real) | 4 | med |
| Orphaned pages | skipped | — |
| Oversized `_learnings.md` | 1 | med |
| Contradictions | 2 | high |
| Stale bullets | 4+ | med |
| Knowledge gaps | 3 | high |

---

## 1. Broken Wikilinks

Four targets resolve to no file in the vault. Five others are template placeholders in SKILL.md/documentation (`ai-techniques-moc`, `frontmatter-design`, `session-archive-filename`, `tooling-patterns-moc`, `Products/{name}/_learnings`) — those are intentional examples, not broken links.

| Target | Sources | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `2026-03-17-vision-gap-analysis` | `CC Chat History/Concepts/product-alpha-constraint.md`, `CC Chat History/Indexes/product-index.md` | Session archive never existed or was not saved with this slug. Content IS captured in `Product Alpha/_learnings.md`. |
| `2026-04-10-vault-reorganization` | `Toolkit/claude-code-setup.md:319` | Template placeholder entry — was written with a session slug that doesn't correspond to an archive. |
| `external-planning-ecosystem` | `CC Chat History/Concepts/three-layer-planning.md:16` | Concept file was never created. The body of the concept exists in `Research/_learnings.md` and `Product Alpha/_learnings.md`. |
| `User Discovery - Persona X Interview 2026-01-15` | `Products/Product Alpha/Example - Entity Placement Deep Dive.md:25` | Discovery document never filed or archived. The example doc links to it as a placeholder. |

**Recommended fix:** Low urgency — content from the missing session archives is captured in `_learnings.md`. For `external-planning-ecosystem`, either create the Concept file or update the wikilink to point to `Research/_learnings.md`. For the discovery interview link, replace with a note or remove the placeholder.

Also note: `[[Products/Product Alpha/_learnings]]` (path-style) appears in 5 docs (PRD V1.4, board-consolidation-plan, etc.) — this file exists but Obsidian resolves path-style wikilinks differently than filename-only links. Works in Obsidian, but flags in any strict link checker.

---

## 2. Orphaned Pages

Not checked this pass — out of scope per cost discipline (requires per-file inbound link counting). Flag for future pass if needed.

---

## 3. Oversized Files

| File | Size | Recommendation |
|---|---|---|
| `Products/Product Alpha/_learnings.md` | 32KB | Exceeds 30KB threshold. The Board section alone is ~20 bullets + 40-row decisions table. Consider splitting the Board and Key Decisions table into a separate `_board.md` reference doc and keeping `_learnings.md` for learnings/open threads only. |

The other five `_learnings.md` files are well within range (8–24KB).

---

## 4. Contradictions

### C1 — Board Counts (high)

- **Claim A:** `Products/Product Alpha/_learnings.md`, Board section (sourced from `2026-03-24-board-verification`): *"Board rebuild from PRD V1.3 is clean: 37 epics, 292 stories (0 orphaned), 29 prototype spikes reparented, no stale old issues"*
- **Claim B:** `MEMORY.md`, Board section (sourced from 2026-04-10 audit): *"30 capability epics + 2 validation epics + 194 capability stories + 217 hardening stories + 29 prototype spike tasks + 1 audit logging epic"*
- **Likely authority:** MEMORY.md — it reflects the April 10 consolidation (7 epics closed, 112 stories removed). The `_learnings.md` entry predates that work.
- **Recommended fix:** Update `Product Alpha/_learnings.md` Board section to reflect post-audit counts. The full detail is already in MEMORY.md — the `_learnings.md` entry can be a concise summary pointing there.

### C2 — Current PRD Version (high)

- **Claim A:** `MEMORY.md` Product Context and Board sections: latest PRD references are "PRD V1.3.1 (2026-03-19)... Pushed as version 10" and "PRD V1.3 gap items (2026-03-24)... Pushed as version 11." No V1.4 mentioned.
- **Claim B:** `Products/Product Alpha/PRDs/Product Alpha - PRD V1.4.md` exists, `status: draft`, `version: "1.4"`, `updated: 2026-04-16`. `log.md` records a QA loop run on "V1.3.4" (Confluence version) on April 16 that produced a rewrite plan, critique log, and arbitration rulings.
- **Likely authority:** The V1.4 file and log entry — V1.4 is real and has been actively worked. MEMORY.md doesn't know it exists.
- **Recommended fix:** Add a MEMORY.md bullet: *"PRD V1.4 (2026-04-16, draft): QA loop run April 16 produced rewrite plan (54 confirmed issues, 12 CRITICAL). Three artifacts filed in `Products/Product Alpha/`. Confluence push of fixes pending."* Also update any `_learnings.md` open thread that says "Push V1.4 to Confluence after incorporating reviewer feedback."

---

## 5. Stale Bullets

### S1 — Expired deadline (Product Alpha `_learnings.md`, line 184)
- **Bullet:** *"PM should spot-check 10-20 stories (esp Jobs 4.2, 7.1, 7.4) to verify AC splits match PRD intent — by April 7"*
- **Stale because:** April 7 is 14 days past. Either done (remove it) or still needed (remove the deadline and re-flag as an open thread).
- **Same bullet:** `Toolkit/PM Methodology/_learnings.md`, line 70 — duplicate, needs same treatment.

### S2 — Expired deadline (Product Alpha `_learnings.md`, line 187)
- **Bullet:** *"Engineering review: lead engineer to validate 5 test plans by April 11"*
- **Stale because:** April 11 is 10 days past. Verify if done; if not, reassign with updated date.
- **Same bullet:** `Toolkit/PM Methodology/_learnings.md`, line 73 — duplicate, needs same treatment.

### S3 — Board pre-audit counts (Product Alpha `_learnings.md`, line 68)
- **Bullet:** *"Board rebuild from PRD V1.3 is clean: 37 epics, 292 stories (0 orphaned)..."* (Key Decisions table, 2026-03-24 row)
- **Stale because:** Pre-April consolidation. Counts are wrong by ~7 epics and ~100 stories. (See Contradiction C1.)

### S4 — "Feature X is P2 in PRD V1.3" (both Product Alpha and Product Beta `_learnings.md`)
- **Bullet:** *"...PRD V1.3 has this as P2 (Job 6.2) — should be P0"*
- **Stale because:** PRD V1.4 was updated April 16 — unknown if this was addressed. Worth verifying so the recommendation doesn't mislead future sessions.
- **Recommended fix:** After V1.4 review, update the bullet to reflect actual current priority or confirm it's still unresolved.

---

## 6. Knowledge Gaps

### G1 — Patent / IP Strategy (high)

- **Topic:** Patent gap analysis, claim strategy, provisional filing status
- **Appears in:** `2026-04-20-patent-gap-analysis` (named archive), plus `CC Chat History/Concepts/patent-wedges.md` and `CC Chat History/Concepts/regulatory-requirements.md`. MEMORY.md has 12 bullets on this. Multiple April 13–20 sessions likely include patent-related work.
- **Not captured in:** Any `_learnings.md` file. Knowledge Router has no entry for IP/patent strategy.
- **Recommended action:** Create `Research/IP Strategy/_learnings.md`, distill the patent context bullets from MEMORY.md + the named archive. Add a Knowledge Router entry: `| Patent/IP strategy, claim strategy | Research/IP Strategy/_learnings.md |`.

### G2 — 51 Unprocessed Sessions (high)

- **Topic:** Everything from April 8–21 — including customer A meeting (Apr 20), PRD QA loop (Apr 16), user journey map session (Apr 16, 69 turns), customer interview (Apr 14), PRD V1.4 work.
- **Not captured in:** Any `_learnings.md` — all six files still show `updated: 2026-04-06`. The `log.md` confirms significant artifacts were created (filed to vault) but the `_learnings.md` domain files weren't updated in parallel.
- **Recommended action:** Run `/archive-session` on the 4-5 highest-value sessions (Apr 14 customer interview, Apr 16 user journey sync, Apr 20 customer meeting), then distill insights into the appropriate `_learnings.md` files.

### G3 — Customer A / Deployment Decision Context (med)

- **Topic:** Customer A engagement (Apr 20), data export scope, deployment options (Option A vs B), approval pathway timing
- **Appears in:** `Meetings/2026-04-20-customer-a-meeting-summary.md` and `Deliverables/Slides/2026-04-20-deployment-decision.*` (per log)
- **Not captured in:** Any `_learnings.md`. No Knowledge Router entry for Customer A program context.
- **Recommended action:** This is program-level context that spans products — add a bullet to `Research/_learnings.md` or create `Programs/Customer A/_learnings.md`. At minimum, add the key decision (Option B recommended) to MEMORY.md under a new "Program Decisions" section.

---

## 7. Skipped Checks

- **Orphaned pages:** Skipped — cost-prohibitive without per-file inbound link counting; session archives are intentionally terminal.
- **Jira ticket staleness:** Skipped this pass — Jira MCP is available but spot-checking 10 random ticket IDs against live Jira would require confirming active session. Defer to next pass.
- **Standard markdown link validation:** Partial only — verified high-risk links (persona files linking to old `Products/User Personas/` path). No broken standard-markdown links found in spot-checks; `Research/Personas/User/` structure appears intact.

---

## 8. Next Steps (Prioritized)

1. **Fix Contradiction C2 (PRD version in MEMORY.md)** — 5-minute fix, high impact. Add one bullet to MEMORY.md Product Context noting V1.4 draft exists and QA loop results. Prevents sessions from treating V1.3 as current.

2. **Fix Contradiction C1 (Board counts in `_learnings.md`)** — Update the Board section of `Product Alpha/_learnings.md` with post-audit numbers. The counts being wrong is a correctness issue if someone relies on them.

3. **Resolve stale deadlines S1 & S2** — Verify if the April 7 story spot-check and April 11 engineering review were done. Remove or re-date the open thread bullets from both `Product Alpha/_learnings.md` and `PM Methodology/_learnings.md`.

4. **Distill gap G1 (patent / IP strategy)** — Run `/archive-session` on `2026-04-20-patent-gap-analysis`, then create an IP strategy domain file. This knowledge is currently locked in MEMORY.md (at risk of truncation) and one session archive.

5. **Distill gap G2 (April sessions)** — Prioritize the Apr 14 customer interview (already partially filed as a named artifact), Apr 16 user journey map, and Apr 20 customer meeting. Route insights to `Product Alpha/_learnings.md` and `Research/_learnings.md`.

6. **Create `external-planning-ecosystem` Concept or update link** — Low effort; the content already exists in `Research/_learnings.md`.

7. **Prune Product Alpha `_learnings.md`** toward the 30KB limit — extract the Board section into a reference sub-file once counts are corrected.
